name: 站立微笑
action: The baby stands in a stable cute pose with a tiny gentle smile and both hands relaxed.

name: 招手
action: The baby raises one small hand in a soft waving gesture, expression friendly and calm.

name: 双手举起
action: The baby lifts both small hands happily, looking bright and lively.

name: 坐着发呆
action: The baby sits with a slightly blank curious expression, quietly staring forward.

action: The baby lies on the tummy and lifts the head slightly, looking curious.

name: 睡着微笑
action: The baby is sleeping with a tiny sweet smile, body relaxed.

name: 眨眼疑惑

name: 噘嘴

name: 看左侧

name: 看右侧
action: The baby turns slightly to the right and glances sideways with a calm expression.

name: 被抱着
action: The baby is shown in a simple being-held pose suitable for insert illustration, focus still on the face and upper body.

name: 洗澡前

name: 踢腿

action: The baby holds both little fists near the chest with a quietly determined cute expression.

name: 半身头像
action: Create a clean bust portrait version centered on the face for reusable editorial placement.

action: The baby tilts the head slightly with a soft sweet smile.

name: 抿嘴看人
action: The baby looks forward with a tiny closed-mouth expression, observant and adorable.
